data.raceComments: {"comment":"12. TIME FOR SANDALS returns after seven months and her Haydock Sprint Cup effort was better than it reads given she was beaten only 4L among G1 company. Proven fresh and effective tackling this trip she looks set to feature. 1. ARAMRAM made a striking reappearance landing the Listed Cammidge Trophy at Doncaster tackling 1200m and there could be more to come. Major player. 13. BECKFORD'S FOLLY has not been seen since a G3 success in the Cornwallis Stakes here attempting 1000m. That form gives him genuine claims. 6. JASOUR shaped well when second on return at Doncaster and is firmly in the mix again.","runners":[12,1,13,6],"exclusive":false}
